controlled_vocabulary_source.notes: Canonical bounded-value source for validators that enforce shared controlled vocabularies.

schemas.name: logos_node_min
schemas.notes: Minimal frontmatter-oriented validation for governed content-node documents. Governance addenda, roadmap notes, and other non-node authored records remain outside this contract until dedicated schemas exist.

schemas.name: logos_claim_min
schemas.notes: Minimal validation for governed claim objects.

schemas.name: logos_external_mapping_object
schemas.notes: Canonical contract for governed external mapping objects. The dedicated validator resolves canonical targets from real graph objects, excludes example fixtures and templates, and enforces external-handle boundaries.
